arguments.title: WHY DINI FISHING?
arguments.natureDesc: Wild, untouched waters far from mass tourism. Extremadura in its raw state.
arguments.guideDesc: A passionate guide who knows every spot, every season, every fish behavior.
arguments.customDesc: Your stay your way — species, techniques, duration, accommodation.
arguments.passionDesc: No stress. Just fishing, the lake, and memories that last a lifetime.

species.title: THE SPECIES
species.subtitle: Pike, Bass, Zander, Comizo Barbel — Extremadura's predators are waiting for you.

accommodation.title: SLEEP LAKESIDE
accommodation.subtitle: Our lakeside villas extend the experience — wake at dawn, fish at sunset, dine under the stars.

stays.title: OUR STAYS
stays.subtitle: Packages designed for every angler — from a quick weekend to a custom stay.

accommodation.title: ACCOMMODATION
accommodation.subtitle: Sleep lakeside in our characterful villas.

combine.title: COMBINE FISHING + ACCOMMODATION
combine.subtitle: Our all-inclusive stays integrate accommodation, guiding, licenses and meals. The ideal formula to fully enjoy.
